title: Enzo’s CGH Labeling Kit for Oligo Arrays
author: Hendrik F HFvE Van Essen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zjuf4nw

steps.title: pipette the following in a nuclease free thermocycler strip
steps.instruction: pipette the following in a nuclease free thermocycler strip: a.DNA X µl b. water19 – X µl(Vial W) b.Primers/Reaction buffer20 µl(Vial 1) Total volume:39 µl

steps.title: Add cap, flick to mix contents and briefly spin down
steps.instruction: Add cap, flick to mix contents and briefly spin down

steps.title: Place in a cooled 96 well...
steps.instruction: Place in a cooled 96 well rack on ice 4 °C for 00:05:00

steps.title: Add, while samples are on ice 4. °C
steps.instruction: Add, while samples are on ice 4. °C : a.To test sample 10 µl Cy3(Vial 2) b.To reference sample10 µl Cy5(Vial 3) c.Klenow Exo-DNA Pol 1 µl (Vial 4) Total50 µl

steps.title: Add cap, flick to mix contents and briefly spin down
steps.instruction: Add cap, flick to mix contents and briefly spin down

steps.title: Add 5µl of Stop Buffer (Vial...
steps.instruction: Add 5µl of Stop Buffer (Vial 5), mix, and briefly centrifuge

steps.title: Transfer labelled DNA’s to 1
steps.instruction: Transfer labelled DNA’s to 1.5 ml reaction tubes and keep Cy3 and Cy5 labelled DNA’s separated

steps.title: Add 275 µl of Binding Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 275 µl of Binding Buffer (PB) PB binding buffer Qiagen Catalog #19066

steps.title: Load column and centrifuge for 60...
steps.instruction: Load column and centrifuge for 60 seconds at 16,000g and discard flow through

steps.title: Add 650 µl of Wash Buffer...
steps.instruction: Add 650 µl of Wash Buffer (PE), centrifuge 60 seconds at 16,000g and discard flow through

steps.title: Centrifuge for 60 seconds at 16,000g,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 60 seconds at 16,000g, discard centrifuge tube and place column in fresh 1.5 ml centrifuge tube

steps.title: Add 10
steps.instruction: Add 10.5 µl of Elution Buffer (EB) (middle of the filter) and incubate for 1 minute.

steps.title: Measure yield and specific dye incorporation with NanoDrop, Program MicroArray
steps.instruction: Measure yield and specific dye incorporation with NanoDrop, Program MicroArray. Labelled, cleaned up gDNA can be stored at -20°C in the dark for 7 days.

steps.title: Add 10
steps.instruction: Add 10.5 µl of Elution Buffer (EB) (middle of the filter) and incubate for 1 minute. .
